claim_title: Version declarations are inconsistent across locations

results.description: Verify version authority is harmonized and package exports version symbol.
results.command: pyv=$(rg -n '^version\s*=\s*"([0-9.]+)"' pyproject.toml | sed -E 's/.*"([0-9.]+)".*/\1/'); pipev=$(rg -n '__version__\s*=\s*"([0-9.]+)"' scripts/pipeline/__init__.py | sed -E 's/.*"([0-9.]+)".*/\1/'); pkg_ref=$(rg -n 'from \.version import __version__' cohort_projections/__init__.py | wc -l); echo "PYPROJECT_VERSION=$pyv"; echo "PIPELINE_INIT_VERSION=$pipev"; echo "PACKAGE_VERSION_IMPORTS=$pkg_ref"; if [ "$pyv" = "$pipev" ] && [ "$pkg_ref" -ge 1 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
